subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! Abú-Dharr-i-Ghaffárí was but a shepherd, consumed with sorrow and lamentation; yet did he find the light of guidance and attain unto the shelter [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حق ابوذر غفاری شبانی بود پر فغان و زاری ولی نور هدایت یافت و بظل
subcodes.subjects: @stories; anecdotes, @call to action, @family of Muhammad; early figures in Islam
